title: OCI IAM Admin Policy Created with Manage All
description: Detects creation of an IAM policy containing overly permissive 'manage all-resources' statement, which grants full administrative access.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and (('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createpolicy' and 'Original Log Content' like '*manage all-resources*') or ('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createpolicy' and 'Resource Name' like '*manage all-resources*'))
falsepositives: Routine policy changes by authorized administrators
